tools.name: search_meditations
tools.description:
Search Bible meditation audios for sleep, relaxation, and spiritual comfort.

## When to Use (ONLY these scenarios)
- "I can't sleep" / "help me relax" / insomnia → Play sleep meditations
- "I'm feeling anxious" / "calm me down" / stressed → Play calming audio
- "Play Psalms" / "Bible meditation" → Play Scripture audio
- "Bedtime Bible story" / "sleep story" → Play bedtime stories
- "I lost someone" / "need comfort" / grieving → Play healing audio

## When NOT to Use (DO NOT trigger for these)
- Device/computer questions: "How do I put my computer to sleep mode?" → NOT about sleeping, about device settings
- Academic/history questions: "What are the historical origins of Genesis?" → NOT meditation, wants information
- Medical questions: "What medication for anxiety?" → NOT meditation, seeks medical advice
- Reading requests: "Read me Bible verse" → Wants text, not audio meditation
- General knowledge: Any question about Bible facts, history, or theology

## Search Parameters
All parameters are optional. Use them based on user intent:

1. **series** - Filter by series name (partial match)
   Examples: "Sleep", "Anxiety", "Peace", "Psalms", "Grief"

2. **keyword** - Search in title/description
   Examples: "rest", "fear", "alone", "morning", "night"

3. **scripture** - Filter by Bible book
   Examples: "Psalms", "Matthew", "John", "Romans", "Philippians"

4. **limit** - Number of results (default: 5, max: 10)

## Search Strategy by User Need

**Sleep Problems:**
- series="Sleep" or series="14-Night Sleep Reset"

**Anxiety/Stress:**
- series="Anxiety" or series="Calm Anxiety"
- series="Peace" or series="21-Day Peace Journey"

**Grief/Loss:**
- series="Grief" or series="Healing"

**Morning Routine:**
- series="Morning" or keyword="morning"

**Scripture Reading:**
- series="Psalms" or series="Scripture"
- scripture="Psalms" for specific book

**General/Browse:**
- Leave empty for recommendations

## Available Series (16 total, 191 audios)

**Sleep & Rest:**
- "14-Night Sleep Reset" (14) - Overcome insomnia
- "Sleep & Rest" (10)

**Anxiety & Peace:**
- "10-Day Anxiety Detox" (10) - Release anxiety through Scripture
- "Calm Anxiety" (12)
- "21-Day Peace Journey" (21) - Daily peace meditation
- "Peaceful Moments" (12)

**Healing & Comfort:**
- "5-Day Path from Grief to Hope" (5)
- "Healing & Comfort" (10)
- "Family & Relationships" (10)

**Scripture & Psalms:**
- "30-Day Selected Psalms Reading Plan" (30)
- "7-Day Psalm Immersion" (7)
- "Scripture Immersions" (10)

**Other:**
- "7 Peaceful Mornings" (7)
- "Protection & Safety" (10)
- "Journey Night Stories" (10)

## Tips
- Partial match works: "Sleep" matches "14-Night Sleep Reset"
- Combine parameters for precision: series="Anxiety" + scripture="Psalms"
- No parameters = general recommendations
